hero.title: Become MIRYA Research Participant
hero.description: We are looking for participants to help us shape the future of MIRYA. If you are interested in taking part in research activities fill your details out below. By submitting this form, you agree to our privacy policy.

rewards.title: Your Rewards for Joining MIRYA User Testing
rewards.description: You’ll receive free access to MIRYA, early access to new features, and exclusive discounts on paid plans after completing your user test.

questions.employees: How many number of employees do you have?
questions.tools: Which tools, software, or systems your team uses?
questions.processes: What type of processes do you want to automate?
questions.automationTools: Do you currently use any automation or RPA tools?
questions.deploymentType: Which deployment type do you prefer?
questions.itResources: Does your organization have IT resources?
questions.plans: Which MIRYA plans are you using?
questions.outcome: What is the main outcome you want to achieve with MIRYA?
questions.miryaFamiliar: How familiar you are with MIRYA?
questions.aiFamiliar: How familiar are you with artificial intelligence?
questions.automationTiming: How soon do you plan to implement automation?
questions.referral: How did you hear about MIRYA?
questions.challenges: Tell us more about your current challenges or expectations.
